name: PAY_TASK_PARAMETERS_O_V
query: SELECT b.task_parameter_id, b.base_task_parameter_id, b.base_task_action_id, b.base_task_parameter_name, b.module_id, b.object_version_number, b.display_flag, b.param_disp_type, b.param_usage_type, b.param_sequence, b.param_lookup, b.param_value_set, b.default_type, b.default_val, ldg.legislative_data_group_id, ldg.legislation_code, b.data_type, b.data_domain, b.namespace, b.repetitive_flag, b.parameter_type, b.element_name, b.parent_task_param_id, b.driving_label_method, b.last_update_date, b.last_updated_by, b.last_update_login, b.created_by, b.creation_date, b.param_level, tl.parameter_name , tl.description FROM pay_task_parameters b, pay_task_parameters_tl tl, per_legislative_data_groups ldg WHERE b.task_parameter_id = tl.task_parameter_id AND USERENV('LANG') =tl.language AND ( (b.legislative_data_group_id IS NOT NULL AND b.legislation_code IS NULL AND b.legislative_data_group_id =ldg.legislative_data_group_id) OR (b.legislation_code IS NOT NULL AND b.legislative_data_group_id IS NULL AND b.legislation_code =ldg.legislation_code AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT null FROM pay_task_parameters c1 WHERE b.base_task_parameter_id = c1.base_task_parameter_id AND (c1.legislative_data_group_id IS NOT NULL AND c1.legislation_code IS NULL AND c1.legislative_data_group_id =ldg.legislative_data_group_id ) ))) OR ( b.legislative_data_group_id IS NULL AND b.legislation_code IS NULL AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT null FROM pay_task_parameters c2 WHERE b.base_task_parameter_id = c2.base_task_parameter_id AND ( ( c2.legislative_data_group_id IS NOT NULL AND c2.legislation_code IS NULL AND c2.legislative_data_group_id =ldg.legislative_data_group_id ) OR ( c2.legislation_code IS NOT NULL AND c2.legislative_data_group_id IS NULL AND c2.legislation_code =ldg.legislation_code ) ) ) ) ))
